adapters.instructionsFileHint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the system prompt at runtime.
adapters.instructionsFileHintCodex: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the system prompt at runtime. Note: Codex may still auto-apply repo-scoped AGENTS.md files from the workspace.
adapters.instructionsFileHintCursor: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the prompt at runtime.
adapters.instructionsFileHintGemini: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Prepended to the Gemini prompt at runtime.
adapters.deviceAuthDescription: Always enabled for gateway agents. Paperclip persists a device key during onboarding so pairing approvals remain stable across runs.

schedule.cronHelp: Five fields: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week

workspace.freshIsolatedDesc: A fresh isolated workspace will be created when this issue runs.
workspace.reuseExistingDesc: This issue will reuse an existing workspace when it runs.
workspace.projectDefaultDesc: This issue will use the project default workspace configuration when it runs.
workspace.noRuntimeRunning: No runtime services are currently running for this workspace.
workspace.noRuntimeConfigured: No runtime-service default is configured for this workspace yet.
workspace.sharedServicesDesc: Shared services for this project workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
workspace.runtimeServicesMustBeJson: Runtime services JSON must be a JSON object.
workspace.remoteManagedRequiresRef: Remote-managed workspaces require a remote workspace ref or repo URL.
workspace.requiresPathOrUrl: Workspace requires at least one local path or repo URL.
workspace.localPathMustBeAbsolute: Local workspace path must be absolute.
workspace.repoUrlMustBeValid: Repo URL must be a valid URL.
workspace.noRuntimeDefined: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
workspace.projectWorkspaceDesc: Configure the concrete workspace Paperclip attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.
workspace.isPrimaryWorkspace: This is the project's primary codebase workspace.

documents.title: Documents
documents.revisionPreviewDesc: This is a historical preview. Restoring it creates a new latest revision and keeps history append-only.
documents.keyValidation: Use lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _, and start with a letter or number.
documents.keyBodyRequired: Document key and body are required
documents.keyFormatError: Document key must start with a letter or number and use only lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _.
documents.changedRemotely: Document changed remotely and the latest version could not be loaded
documents.saveBeforeViewingRevision: Save or cancel your local changes before viewing an older revision.

onboarding.defaultTaskTitle: Hire your first engineer and create a hiring plan
onboarding.defaultTaskDescription:
You are the CEO. You set the direction for the company.

- hire a founding engineer
- write a hiring plan
- break the roadmap into concrete tasks and start delegating work

onboarding.readyToLaunchDesc: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.

properties.provisionTeardownDesc: Provision runs inside the derived worktree before agent execution. Teardown is stored here for future cleanup flows.

outputFeedback.consentDescription: Choose whether voted AI outputs can be shared with Paperclip Labs. This answer becomes the default for future thumbs up and thumbs down votes.
outputFeedback.consentLocalNote: This vote is always saved locally.
outputFeedback.consentChooseNote: Choose {{alwaysAllow}} to share this vote and future voted AI outputs. Choose {{dontAllow}} to keep this vote and future votes local.
outputFeedback.consentChangeNote: You can change this later in Instance Settings > General.

pathInstructions.title: How to get a full path
pathInstructions.description: Paste the absolute path (e.g. /Users/you/project) into the input field.

mac.step1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
mac.step3: Hold the Option (⌥) key — "Copy" changes to "Copy as Pathname".
mac.step4: Click "Copy as Pathname", then paste here.
mac.tip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, and press Enter. Then type pwd to see the full path.

windows.step1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
windows.step2: Click in the address bar at the top — the full path will appear.
windows.step3: Copy the path, then paste here.
windows.tip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select "Copy as path".

linux.step1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
linux.step2: Run pwd to print the full path.
linux.step3: Copy the output and paste here.
linux.tip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.

reportsToPicker.staleMissingNote: Saved manager is missing from this company. Choose a new manager or clear.

agentConfig.specifyPathDescription: Browser security blocks apps from reading full local paths via a file picker. Copy the absolute path and paste it into the input.

mac.step2: Hold Option and right-click the folder.
mac.step4: Paste the result into the path input.

windows.step1: Find the folder in File Explorer.
windows.step2: Hold Shift and right-click the folder.
windows.step4: Paste the result into the path input.

terminal.step3: Copy the output and paste it into the path input.

accountingModel.title: Accounting model
accountingModel.description: Paperclip now separates request-level inference usage from account-level finance events. That keeps provider reporting honest when the biller is OpenRouter, Cloudflare, Bedrock, or another intermediary.

inferenceLedger.description: Request-scoped usage and billed runs from cost_events.

liveQuotas.description: Provider or biller windows that can stop traffic in real time.

concurrencyPolicy.coalesceIfActive: Keep one follow-up run queued while an active run is still working.
concurrencyPolicy.alwaysEnqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if several runs stack up.
concurrencyPolicy.skipIfActive: Drop overlapping trigger occurrences while the routine is already active.

catchUpPolicy.skipMissed: Ignore schedule windows that were missed while the routine or scheduler was paused.
catchUpPolicy.enqueueMissedWithCap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.

signingMode.bearer: Expect a shared bearer token in the Authorization header.
signingMode.hmacSha256: Expect an HMAC SHA-256 signature over the request using the shared secret.

runTranscriptUxLab.description: Built from a real Paperclip development run, then sanitized so no secrets, local paths, or environment details survive into the fixture.
